mapper.select: SELECT id, name, type, url, file_path, headers, refresh_rate, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM m3u8_providers WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, name, type, url, file_path, headers, refresh_rate, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM m3u8_providers WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, name, type, url, file_path, headers, refresh_rate, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM m3u8_providers WHERE type = #{type} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, name, type, url, file_path, headers, refresh_rate, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM m3u8_providers WHERE enabled = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, name FROM m3u8_providers WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO m3u8_providers (name, type, url, file_path, headers, refresh_rate, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{type}, #{url}, #{filePath}, #{headers}, #{refreshRate}, #{enabled}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE m3u8_providers SET name = #{name}, type = #{type}, url = #{url}, file_path = #{filePath}, headers = #{headers}, refresh_rate = #{refreshRate}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
